content: Hey, I'm so excited to finally have some free time on my hands. I just started a YouTube channel and I'm planning to post videos about my salsa dancing journey.
That sounds like a great idea! What inspired you to start a YouTube channel?
I've always loved salsa dancing and I've been taking classes at a local studio in downtown Los Angeles for about 5 years now. I'm Phoenix, by the way, and I work as an ER nurse at City Hospital.
Nice to meet you, Phoenix! It's great that you're pursuing your passion for salsa dancing. Do you have any plans for your channel's content?

Yeah, I'm thinking of posting videos every Wednesday and Sunday. I want to share my favorite dance moves, and maybe even have some guest dancers on the show. I'm also reading a lot of philosophy books in my free time, which helps me relax after a long shift at the hospital.
That sounds like a great plan! Philosophy can be really interesting. What kind of philosophy books are you into?
I'm really into existentialism right now. I just finished reading 'The Myth of Sisyphus' by Albert Camus. It's really making me think about my life and my priorities.
That's a great book! Existentialism can be really thought-provoking. How do you think your YouTube channel will fit into your life priorities?

I think it'll be a great way for me to express myself and connect with others who share my passions. I'm planning to launch my channel on January 15th, and I'm hoping to have at least 100 subscribers by the end of the month.
That's a great goal! Do you have any plans for how you'll promote your channel?
Yeah, I'm thinking of using social media to promote my channel. I have a friend who's a graphic designer, and she's offered to help me create some promotional materials.
That's great! Having a friend who can help with design can be really helpful. What's your friend's name, if you don't mind me asking?
Her name is Sophia, and she's actually a colleague of mine at the hospital. We often talk about our hobbies and side projects during our breaks.
That's great! It's always nice to have supportive friends and colleagues. I think you have a good chance of reaching your goal of 100 subscribers by the end of the month.
Thanks, I'm keeping my fingers crossed! I'm also planning to play some piano music in the background of my videos, which I think will add a nice touch.
